title: MBBS Jobs 2026 – Project Research Scientist I
shortInfo: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Research Scientist I (Medical). Candidates with MBBS Can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 04-06-2026. For detailed information please visit ICMR NITVAR official website icmr.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Research Scientist I (Medical). Candidates with MBBS Can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 04-06-2026. For detailed information please visit ICMR NITVAR official website icmr.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per ICMR guidelines

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR NITVAR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NITVAR recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post at ICMR NITVAR is scheduled for 04 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) position is MBBS. Ensure you possess this degree to be eligible.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) position at ICMR NITVAR.

faq.question: What is the application fee for ICMR NITVAR recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post involves a Walk-In-Interview and potentially a Written Test. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) office, located in Pune, Maharashtra.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job offered for the Project Research Scientist I (Medical) post is on a contractual basis.
